title: StockBrief
description: Structured output schema for the stock-brief command. Captures business overview, performance, financials, consensus estimates, catalysts, risks, recent news, and the firm's house view on a single equity.

ticker.description: Exchange ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, 700 HK, DBS SP).

exchange.description: Primary listing exchange (e.g. NASDAQ, HKEX, SGX, NYSE, LSE).

currency.description: Trading currency of the instrument (ISO 4217 code, e.g. USD, HKD, SGD).

business_overview.description: High-level description of the company's business and market position.

description.description: 2–4 sentence plain-English summary of what the company does and its competitive position.

sector.description: GICS sector classification (e.g. Information Technology, Financials).

market_cap.description: Market capitalisation in the instrument's trading currency (millions).

employees.description: Approximate number of full-time employees as of the most recent filing.

price_current.description: Most recent closing price in trading currency.

price_3m_ago.description: Closing price 3 months prior to the data date.

price_1y_ago.description: Closing price 12 months prior to the data date.

return_3m_pct.description: Total return over the trailing 3 months (percentage, e.g. 12.5 = +12.5%).

return_1y_pct.description: Total return over the trailing 12 months (percentage).

ytd_pct.description: Year-to-date total return from 1 January of the current year (percentage).

financials.description: Key trailing-twelve-month (TTM) and ratio-based financial metrics.

revenue_ttm.description: Trailing twelve-month revenue in trading currency (millions).

ebitda_margin_pct.description: EBITDA margin as a percentage of revenue.

net_income_ttm.description: Trailing twelve-month net income in trading currency (millions).

eps_ttm.description: Trailing twelve-month earnings per share in trading currency.

roe_pct.description: Return on equity (TTM) as a percentage.

dividend_yield_pct.description: Trailing dividend yield as a percentage of current price.

estimates.description: Sell-side consensus estimates and price targets for the next fiscal year.

revenue_next_fy.description: Consensus revenue estimate for the next fiscal year (millions).

eps_next_fy.description: Consensus EPS estimate for the next fiscal year in trading currency.

consensus_rating.description: Aggregated consensus rating from covering analysts.

num_analysts.description: Number of analysts contributing to the consensus.

price_target_low.description: Lowest analyst 12-month price target in trading currency.

price_target_high.description: Highest analyst 12-month price target in trading currency.

price_target_median.description: Median analyst 12-month price target in trading currency.

catalysts.description: Upcoming events or developments that could materially move the stock.

description.description: Brief description of the catalyst (e.g. Q2 earnings release, FDA approval decision).

timeframe.description: Expected timing (e.g. Q3 2025, H2 2025, Within 3 months).

upside_driver.description: True if this catalyst is primarily an upside driver; false if it is a downside risk event.

risks.description: Key investment risks for this equity.

recent_news.description: Relevant recent news items about the company.

date.description: Publication date of the news item (ISO 8601).

source.description: Publication or wire service name (e.g. Bloomberg, Reuters, FT).

relevance_note.description: Brief RM-facing note on why this news item is relevant to the investment thesis or client context.

house_view.description: The firm's internal research house view on this security, if available.

available.description: True if the firm has a published house view on this security.

rating.description: Firm's internal rating (only present if available is true).

summary.description: 2–4 sentence summary of the firm's thesis (only present if available is true).

last_updated.description: Date the house view was last published or updated (ISO 8601).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this stock brief was generated.

data_sources.description: MCP tools or data providers that contributed to this brief (for attribution and audit).
